# Fixture: a tiny REQUESTED-permissions list for a fake "GmsCore"-like APK.
# Hand-written -- NOT extracted from a real APK. Mixes privileged perms, a
# non-privileged (normal/runtime) perm that must be DROPPED by the intersection,
# and FAKE_PACKAGE_SIGNATURE which must always survive into the allowlist.
android.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION
android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
android.permission.FAKE_PACKAGE_SIGNATURE
android.permission.INTERNET
android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED
android.permission.UPDATE_APP_OPS_STATS
android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS
